subcodes.first_line: O beloved ones of Azerbaijan! We must needs have from Azerbaijan an Azerbaijan set ablaze with ardour. Refute the violators, and let Tabriz [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای احبای آذربایجان لابد لنا من آذربایجان آذری بجان ناقضان زنید و تبریز را
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @martyrdom of the Bab, @martyrs and martyrdom, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
